opendb_id.description: Unique identifier for the document (UUID v4)

form_factor.description: The form factor of the case (e.g., ATX Mid Tower, Full Tower, Mini-ITX)

supported_motherboard_form_factors.description: Array of motherboard form factors this case can accommodate (e.g., ['ATX', 'Micro ATX', 'Mini-ITX'])

color.description: The color(s) of this product. Each color of the product should be included in the array. Includes exterior and interior colors

power_supply.description: If included with the case, could detail the PSU model.

power_supply_included.description: Whether the case includes a power supply.

supported_power_supply_form_factors.description: The PSU form factors that the case can support.

side_panel.description: The type of side panel (e.g., Tempered Glass, Acrylic, Solid)

has_transparent_side_panel.description: Whether the case has a transparent side panel

front_panel_usb.description:
Legacy front panel USB descriptor (deprecated).

Deprecated field. Populate front_usb_ports instead.

front_usb_ports.description: Array of front panel USB port types

max_video_card_length.description: The maximum supported video card length in mm

max_cpu_cooler_height.description: The maximum supported CPU cooler height in mm

max_psu_length.description: The maximum supported power supply length in mm

internal_3_5_bays.description: The number of internal 3.5" drive bays

internal_2_5_bays.description: The number of internal 2.5" drive bays

external_3_5_bays.description: The number of external 3.5" drive bays

external_5_25_bays.description: The number of external 5.25" drive bays

power_supply_shroud.description: Whether the case has a power supply shroud

riser_expansion_slots.description: The number of riser expansion slots

supports_rear_connecting_motherboard.description: Whether the case supports rear connecting motherboard (BTF, Project Zero, etc)

dimensions.description: The dimensions of the case in mm (e.g., '466 x 290 x 495')

volume.description: The internal volume of the case in liters

general_product_information.description: General product information and retailer SKUs

series.description:
Product series name

The series is the manufacturer's product line / model name that groups related cases. Manufacturer (e.g., Fractal Design, HYTE, NZXT, Lian Li, Corsair) and form_factor (e.g., ATX Mid Tower, ATX Full Tower, Micro ATX Mid Tower) are stored separately and used as the default grouping, so do NOT repeat any of them in the series. The same series CAN span multiple form factors (e.g., 'North' has an ATX Mid Tower and 'North XL' is its own ATX Full Tower variant — those are two separate series). Examples: 'Fractal Design North ATX Mid Tower' → series='North'. 'Fractal Design North XL ATX Full Tower' → series='North XL'. 'HYTE Y70 ATX Mid Tower Snow White' → series='Y70'. 'NZXT H3 Flow Micro ATX Mid Tower Black' → series='H3 Flow'. 'Lian Li O11 Dynamic EVO RGB' → series='O11 Dynamic EVO'. 'Lian Li Lancool 207' → series='Lancool 207'. The series is what a buyer would say to identify the model regardless of color or finish.

variant.description:
Specific variant in the series

Most cases should have an empty variant — color/finish belongs in `manufacturer_color`, not here. Only set a variant when a sub-model needs to be distinguished from the base model within the same (manufacturer, series, form_factor) group. Common reasons: limited / collab editions that change more than just paint (special accessories, glass, hardware bundle), refreshed revisions, or named sub-models the manufacturer markets separately. Examples: standard 'Fractal Design North ATX Mid Tower Black' → variant='' (empty). 'Fractal Design North Momentum Edition ATX Mid Tower' → variant='Momentum Edition'. 'Fractal Design North XL RC ATX Full Tower' → variant='RC'. 'HYTE Y70 ATX Mid Tower Snow White' → variant='' (Snow White is a colorway, not a sub-model). 'NZXT H3 Flow Micro ATX Mid Tower White' → variant='' (color only). The variant must be unique within a (manufacturer, series, form_factor) group — if two cases would collapse to the same variant string AND the same manufacturer_color, you are missing a differentiator.

manufacturer_color.description:
Manufacturer's official color name for this product variant.

Use the manufacturer's official marketed color / colorway name verbatim — most case manufacturers brand their colorways and that name is what should go here. Common HYTE colorways: 'Snow White', 'Pitch Black', 'Panda', 'Taro Milk', 'Black Cherry', 'Blueberry Milk', 'Strawberry Milk', 'Matcha Milk', 'Silver Wolf'. Common Fractal Design colorways: 'Black', 'Chalk White', 'Charcoal Black'. Common NZXT colorways: 'Black', 'White', 'Matte Black', 'Matte White'. Named special-edition / collab colorways belong here when the manufacturer brands them as a distinct colorway and the rest of the hardware is unchanged: 'Persona 3 Reload Edition', 'Hoshimachi Suisei Edition', 'Metaphor: ReFantazio Edition', 'Hatsune Miku Edition'. If the manufacturer does not give a fancy name, fall back to a simple human-readable color from the product images ('Black', 'White', 'White / Silver', 'Charcoal Black'). Do NOT put hardware sub-model differentiators like 'Momentum Edition', 'RC', or 'Flow' in manufacturer_color — those are either the variant or part of the series.

last_manually_spec_verified_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the part specs were last manually verified by a human
